description: Contract.fit provides a backend/API for processing and managing contract-related documents, inboxes, projects, roles, users, and related tenant settings. Its API includes authentication, document upload/processing, reporting, and administrative resources.
summary: Contract.fit exposes one authenticated HTTP API at `//cfportal.contract-p.fit/api`, documented by a Swagger/OpenAPI document and accepting Basic auth, bearer JWTs, or API keys.
